fullArticle:
Cease loses no-hit bid in 9th as Blue Jays beat Giants 10-0

Blue Jays' Dylan Cease loses no-hit bid in 9th inning of 10-0 win over Giants

Blue Jays' Dylan Cease has bid for his 2nd career no-hitter broken up by Giants in 9th inning

Dylan Cease strikes out 9 in 7 innings as Blue Jays blank Mariners 2-0 in ALCS rematch

Dylan Cease has played 8 seasons for the White Sox, Padres and Blue Jays. He has 71 wins, 62 losses, an ERA of 3.77 and 1,379 strikeouts.
